step_rationale: PD-L1 on plaque-resident cells suppresses anti-atherosclerotic immunity, affecting inflammatory balance.
mechanism: PD-L1 expression by macrophages and endothelial cells suppresses protective T-cell responses, promoting chronic plaque inflammation and instability.

references.title: PD-1/PD-L1 Blockade Accelerates the Progression of Atherosclerosis in Cancer Patients.
